title: eryngium × hybridum
intro: Eryngium × hybridum, also known as the eryngium hybrid or sea holly, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Eryngium genus, which includes a variety of flowering plants in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eryngium × hybridum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of colds and flu, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
